_comment: SureCart subscription IDs known to be card-testing fraud, not real members. Excluded from subscriptions.mjs lifecycle metrics (snapshot, cohortRetention, retentionCurve, monthlyFlow, trailing6) so fraud never counts as a real signup, cancellation, or churn. See Notion 'Fraud & Security' runbook (Systems /AI /Dashboards area) for the incident history. Append new waves below with their own dated block — never remove old entries.

waves.label: 2026-07-19 to 2026-07-22 card-testing wave
waves.detectedVia: Member email (luisew@gmail.com) reported a trial receipt she never ordered; cross-checked via SureCart order emails, Stripe fraudulent refunds, and Cesar's SureCart export
waves.pendingManualReviewNote: These 4 are still marked NOT_CANCELLED_NEEDS_REVIEW in the source export as of 2026-07-22 — excluded from dashboard metrics as fraud, but still need someone to actually cancel/refund them in SureCart.
